prompt:
Variable Configuration

Basic Information
Brand Name: H·X
Brand Tag: [e.g., H·X SIGNATURE / Signature / ARTISAN BAKED]

Image Specifications
Aspect Ratio: 9:16 Vertical / 3:4 / 1:1
Style Positioning: Minimalist Fashion / Japanese Warmth / Nordic Cool / Korean Cafe

Background Setting
Background Color: Warm Ivory #F7F1E8
Background Effect: Solid color with slight vignette / Solid gradient / Slight texture

Main Product Definition
Product Type: Salt Bread
Product Quantity: [e.g., 3 naturally stacked / 4 slices / 1 main + 2 blurred]
Product State: [e.g., cut to show inside / pulled apart for texture / complete shape]
Product Texture: [e.g., crispy crust / shiny butter gloss / visible salt / soft core / flowing cheese]
Filling Display: [e.g., honey cheese + sesame layers / garlic butter coating / no filling]

Lighting Style
Lighting Type: Soft diffused natural light / Side light with shadows / Top light luxury feel
Lighting Description: [e.g., soft sunlight + gentle shadows / quiet luxury editorial style / warm morning light]

Typography Layout
Main Title (CH): [e.g., Salt Bread / Loaded Bagel / Japanese Shokupan]
Main Title (EN): [e.g., SALT BREAD / LOADED BAGEL / SHOKUPAN]
Title Position: Top Left / Top Center / Top Right
Subtitle (CH): [e.g., Crispy outside, soft inside, buttery aroma]
Subtitle (EN): [e.g., Crispy crust, pillowy crumb, buttery finish]
Slogan (CH): [e.g., One bite, and the filling's order is revealed]
Slogan (EN): [e.g., A structured bite of richness]

Selling Point Tags (3)
Tag 1: [CH] / [EN]
Tag 2: [CH] / [EN]
Tag 3: [CH] / [EN]

Flavor Menu (Optional)
Flavor 1: [CH] [EN]
Flavor 2: [CH] [EN]
Flavor 3: [CH] [EN]

Props/Decor
Prop Selection: [e.g., linen cloth + small butter knife / slate plate / wooden cutting board / kraft paper]
Prop Principle: Minimalist and restrained, only 1-2 items, no overshadowing the main product

Overall Tone
Style Keywords: [e.g., Nordic + Seoul Cafe / Japanese Wabi-sabi / French Exquisite / Taiwanese Literary]
